title: Owner emergency functions can rug all pooled ETH and tokens at any time
reason: `emergencyWithdraw` and `emergencyWithdrawETH` are explicit, documented `onlyOwner` rescue powers. This is a centralization/trust assumption rather than an unintended protocol flaw.

title: Blocked tokens still accept new liquidity, letting users deposit into already-frozen pools
reason: `provideLiquidity` lacks the blocklist guard, but blocked status by itself does not stop LP withdrawals or prove new deposits become stuck or stealable. The standalone harm is too speculative without a separate insolvency condition.
